citations.narrative:
The enclosure in the digester building housing two black swans has a small section of wire at the base of the door that is
bent into the enclosure with sharp points. These sharp points could be a potential hazard to the swans and this section of
wire mesh needs to be addressed for the safety of the birds.
Correct by: April 18, 2026

The two peafowl housed indoors for winter housing do not have any perching or elevated areas that provides the ability to
roost. These birds roost in trees or on perches and their enclosure needs appropriate perching that allows for these
normal postural behaviors. This needs to be addressed for the health and comfort of the birds.
Correct by: April 18, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. .
n

narrative:
3.153(a)(1)(i) 
   
Primary enclosures. 
The enclosure in the digester building housing two black swans has a small section of wire at the base of the door that is 
bent into the enclosure with sharp points. These sharp points could be a potential hazard to the swans and this section of 
wire mesh needs to be addressed for the safety of the birds.  
 
Correct by: April 18, 2026 
3.153(a)(2) 
   
Primary enclosures. 
The two peafowl housed indoors for winter housing do not have any perching or elevated areas that provides the ability to 
roost. These birds roost in trees or on perches and their enclosure needs appropriate perching that allows for these 
normal postural behaviors. This needs to be addressed for the health and comfort of the birds.  
 
Correct by: April 18, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. .
